channel.title: Follow Builders — X/Twitter
channel.description: AI builders' latest tweets, curated by follow-builders

item.title: Swyx (@swyx): @jsconfeu @cramforce talk now live! @vercel is doing incredible AI engineering work and it comes dir...

item.title:

A design is an intention. Not an image or a p...
item.description:

A design is an intention. Not an image or a prototype. Output without intention is hallucination. https://t.co/S7QAxEwVRM

item.title: Aaron Levie (@levie): “If AI can make employees more productive, which is widely accepted as fact, then companies are goin...
item.description:
“If AI can make employees more productive, which is widely accepted as fact, then companies are going to want as many productive units of labor as possible. This is a key reason why I am changing my mind.”
This is why jevons paradox is really important to understand with AI right now.
And counterintuitively, this trend is going to increase as AI gets better. The better AI gets at performing tasks, the more companies can take on those tasks, which leads to hiring more people to do the surrounding work of those tasks.
Think about the small business that can’t afford to build complex software. When AI is only a little good nothing changes for them. When it’s really good they can finally hire engineers that have the impact of 5-10X, so they can finally invest in engineering.
The sales team that can automate customer intelligence and outbound demand gen will hire more sales people because they have more leads to go after. The marketing team that can now do higher-end video production than before will hire a video editor. And so on.
This is going to happen in more and more surprisingly ways.
Bio: ceo @box - your business lives in content. unleash it with AI ❤️ 476 🔁 54

item.title: Garry Tan (@garrytan): Change the party to murder all capitalists (Piker) and destroy the schools (Bowman), brought to you ...
item.description:

No thanks! https://t.co/2NMikjnt41
Bio: President & CEO @ycombinator —Founder @garryslist—Creator of GStack & GBrain—designer/engineer who helps founders—SF Dem accelerating the boom loop ❤️ 349 🔁 25

item.title: Matt Turck (@mattturck): Combining Cohere and Aleph Alpha is such an interesting moment. Spending a lot of time outside the ...
item.description:
Combining Cohere and Aleph Alpha is such an interesting moment. Spending a lot of time outside the US, hard to overstate how much reluctance there is to outsourcing intelligence to a handful of US platforms, given current geopolitical chaos.
Bio: VC at @FirstMarkCap. Host: MAD Podcast; Organizer: Data Driven NYC, Author: MAD Landscape. ❤️ 39 🔁 3

item.title:
Nikunj Kothari (@nikunj): Some of my relatively new favorite follows..
> @amypretzel (texture) > @Vtrivedy10 (harness) ...
item.description:
Some of my relatively new favorite follows..
> @amypretzel (texture) > @Vtrivedy10 (harness) > @oliverhamrin (sheer aura) > @jakubkrehel (design) > @deredleritt3r (AI) > @kevg1412 (investing historian) > @jessegenet (homeschooling)
Who else should I add?
Bio: partner @fpvventures - investing in seed/A. previous: early hire @meter, @opendoor, @atlassian & others. love @shimoleejhaveri + 👦👧 ❤️ 118 🔁 4

item.title: Nikunj Kothari (@nikunj): Note to all product teams: project code names are not temporary, they are permanent. Like truly eter...
item.description:
Note to all product teams: project code names are not temporary, they are permanent. Like truly eternal.
Choose very very wisely.
Bio: partner @fpvventures - investing in seed/A. previous: early hire @meter, @opendoor, @atlassian & others. love @shimoleejhaveri + 👦👧 ❤️ 76 🔁 2

item.title:
Peter Steinberger (@steipete): 🛰️ discrawl 0.6.0 is out!
Biggest new feature is that it can now *read* Discord DMs without any cus...
item.description:
🛰️ discrawl 0.6.0 is out!
Biggest new feature is that it can now *read* Discord DMs without any custom login tricks that might get you blocked. No writing since it's not nice to send humans slop. https://t.co/nxGZSlAYl0
Bio: Polyagentmorous ClawFather. Came back from retirement to mess with AI and help a lobster take over the world. @OpenClaw🦞 + @OpenAI ❤️ 229 🔁 18
